above.description: Observed terminal value must be greater than the stated value.

below.description: Observed terminal value must be less than the stated value.

exactly.description: Observed terminal value must equal the stated value, rounded to two decimals unless contract or source convention specifies otherwise.

at_least.description: Observed terminal value must be greater than or equal to the stated value.

between.description: Lower bound inclusive and upper bound exclusive unless otherwise specified.

field_notes.underlying: Combines value, political stat, and time period.
field_notes.political_stat: Exact metric, entity, organization, population, unit, and qualifications.
field_notes.value: Numeric, text, range, or None as stated in the contract.
field_notes.source_agencies: Ordered official or contract-defined source hierarchy.
field_notes.time_period: Measurement, publication, distribution, event, relative, or exact capture window.
field_notes.first_release_rule: First official or non-preliminary release resolves unless contract says otherwise.
field_notes.no_data_fallback: If no data is released by expiration, last fair price is determined solely by the Exchange.
field_notes.last_trading_rule: One minute before expected release or capture when specified; otherwise expiration date/time.
field_notes.expiration_rule: Latest default three months after scheduled release or period end unless venue rules alter timing.
field_notes.settlement_value: YES pays 1.0; this is not a probability or alpha statement.
field_notes.position_accountability_level: Venue risk constraint, not executable depth.
field_notes.contingency_review_rule: Rule 7.1 review or indeterminate expiration value requires human review.

non_applicability_note: Do not claim POLITICALSTAT applies to Hormuz or any other series unless specifically verified by contract review.
